title: Teltonika TAP200 (without PSU)
description: TAP200 is the first-ever Teltonika Networks Access Point with 2.4GHz and 5GHz WiFi with WPA2/WPA3 security standards. For network connectivity has 1x 1Gb/s port with PoE 802.3af support. Web management or RMS Management for configuration multiple devices at once. Free access to RMS Management for 24 months 2.4GHz and 5GHz with WPA2/WPA3 security standards 1x 100Mb/s Ethernet with PoE 802.3af support Fast roaming (802.11r) RMS management Unit Quick Start Guide
specsSearch: Wireless features Frequency range [MHz] 2400 - 2500, 5150 - 5850 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ac - wave2 MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 5,5 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 190 Width [mm] 158 Height [mm] 30 Depth [mm] 158 Hardware CPU Dual Core CPU frequency [MHz] 880
